summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Nurekha landing page. All major components and functionality working correctly with minor text extraction issues.

design_issues.component: Hero heading and CTA heading text extraction
design_issues.issue: Text content extraction missing spaces between words in some cases (e.g., 'Your business,always online.' instead of 'Your business, always online.')
design_issues.note: Visual display is correct, only text extraction issue in testing

passed_tests: Navbar displays with Nurekha wordmark and all nav links (Home, Pricing, Services, Docs)
Sign in and Build Your Agent buttons present and clickable
Hero section displays with correct heading and subtitle
Hero section has two CTA buttons (Build your agent free, Watch demo) - both clickable
Channel bar shows all 5 channels (Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, TikTok, Website)
Features grid shows all 6 feature cards with correct data-testids
How It Works section has all 4 steps (01-04)
Business Types shows all 9 cards with correct data-testids
Dark CTA section displays with correct button
Footer renders with all Product, Company, Support columns and links
Mobile menu toggle works (hamburger button opens/closes menu)
All data-testid attributes present on interactive elements
Fonts render correctly: Instrument Serif for headings, Geist for body text
All buttons are clickable and interactive
